narrative:
29 Ohio House district has 85,675 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.3% D−R vs -12.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
